subject: conversation with edison re: getting negative ctc paid

emails.subject: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.subject_base: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.body: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid I don't understand the netting that you are referring to. Does it mean that they will pay negative ctc's up to some just and reasonable amount and anything above the j&r level will be paid out when all of the other people are paid. How do they define the "ESP's share of the undercollection?" To: Shapiro, Richard; Steffes, James D.; Mellencamp, Lisa; Tribolet, Michael; Sanders, Richard B.; Kean, Steven J.; Sharp, Vicki; Smith, Mike; Williams, Robert C.; Curry, Wanda; Swain, Steve; Huddleson, Diann; Calger, Christopher F.; Belden, Tim; Dietrich, Janet

emails.subject: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.subject_base: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.body: I'll give you a call and fax you some materials that Edison uses to justify their position. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.subject_base: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.body: What's your fax number? To: Dasovich, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.subject_base: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid

emails.subject: RE: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.subject_base: Conversation with Edison re: Getting Negative CTC Paid
emails.body: thanks. it's on its way. i'll give you a call, or give me a call when you've had a chance to look at it. i'll include steve swain on the fax. To: Dasovich, Jeff
